/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/widget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/logger.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/server_plex.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client.dir/serverudp.cpp.o" -o QTSimple_TCP_Server-Client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
